mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO byai_notification (id, title, content, biz_type, priority, is_read, resource_biz_type, resource_id, is_deleted, sender_id, target_id, create_time, read_time, expire_time, extra_info) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.priority}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.resourceBizType}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.readTime}, #{item.expireTime}, #{item.extraInfo})
mapper.update: update byai_notification set is_read = '1', read_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where target_id = #{targetId} and is_deleted = '0' and is_read = '0'
